toy1_fixed.description: 2 base vars, latent dropped; inconsistent (H2 baseline)

toy2_fixed.description: 3 base vars, latent dropped; inconsistent (H2 baseline)

toy3_fixed.description: 2 base vars, shared latent dropped; inconsistent (H2 baseline)

toy1_augmented.description: 2 base vars + latent u; consistent (gold x=2, y=1, u=2)

auxiliary.why_fixed_fails: Drop u: eq1/eq2 fix (x,y)=(2,-1); the leftover eq3 (x-4) demands x=4. 3 constraints, 2 unknowns, no common solution.

toy2_augmented.description: 3 base vars + latent u; consistent (gold x=3, y=2, z=1, u=2)

auxiliary.why_fixed_fails: Drop u: sum + two differences fix (x,y,z)=(3,2,1); the leftover eq4 (x-5) demands x=5. Over-determined, inconsistent.

toy3_augmented.description: 2 base vars + shared latent u; consistent (gold x=2, y=4, u=2)

auxiliary.why_fixed_fails: Drop u (which appeared in two measurements): eq1/eq2 force (x,y)=(4,6); the leftover eq3 (x+y-6) wants the sum to be 6. Contradiction.
